content:
UP is a intuitive, and user-friendly workout tracking app designed to take your fitness journey to new heights. Available on both iOS and Android, UP is crafted to enhance the effectiveness of your exercise routines with simplicity and power.
Key Features:
Workout Tracking & Planning: Easily build routines, track progress, and monitor gains with friends. Stay Organized: Plan your training schedules, set goals, and review your achievements. Seamless Progress Monitoring: Track every rep, set, and personal best with ease. Download UP here
summary:
UP is a intuitive, and user-friendly workout tracking app designed to take your fitness journey to new heights. Available on both iOS and Android, UP is crafted to enhance the effectiveness of your exercise routines with simplicity and power.
Key Features:
Workout Tracking & Planning: Easily build routines, track progress, and monitor gains with friends. Stay Organized: Plan your training schedules, set goals, and review your achievements. Seamless Progress Monitoring: Track every rep, set, and personal best with ease.
title: UP

content:
BillWise is an open source bill management application for restaurants with meal and drink entries, service charges, discounts, and sales reports, built-in Python and Flask.
Sales reports feature data analytics and data visualisations to quickly understand sales trends and operational insights for informed decision-making.
To do
Fix insert each paid bill into the CSV file
Fix display visualisations of the sales report
Deploy the app on Heroku
Adjust the size of the buttons to ensure they display correctly on screens of varying sizes.
summary:
BillWise is an open source bill management application for restaurants with meal and drink entries, service charges, discounts, and sales reports, built-in Python and Flask.
Sales reports feature data analytics and data visualisations to quickly understand sales trends and operational insights for informed decision-making.
To do
Fix insert each paid bill into the CSV file
Fix display visualisations of the sales report
Deploy the app on Heroku
Adjust the size of the buttons to ensure they display correctly on screens of varying sizes.
title: Billy

content:
Moverba is an innovative Instagram page designed to help users enhance their English skills through movies. Each post integrates movie scenes, quotes, and dialogues as engaging tools for language learning.
Perfect for cinephiles and language learners alike, Moverba makes mastering English enjoyable by connecting it with popular cinematic content.
summary:
Moverba is an innovative Instagram page designed to help users enhance their English skills through movies. Each post integrates movie scenes, quotes, and dialogues as engaging tools for language learning.
Perfect for cinephiles and language learners alike, Moverba makes mastering English enjoyable by connecting it with popular cinematic content.
title: Moverba
